name: Cape Town (Western Cape, South Africa)

colors.symbolism: peace and the field of the flag

description: A white field charged with the modern logo-style emblem of the City of Cape Town — featuring stylised Table Mountain, the sun, and the ocean.
history: Cape Town is the legislative capital of South Africa and the principal city of the Western Cape. The current city flag and emblem use the modern visual identity adopted by the City of Cape Town metropolitan municipality.

features.role: Logo of the City of Cape Town
features.symbolism: stylised Table Mountain, sun, and ocean — the city's defining geography
